title: Adopt a system-scoped work log
summary: Established a root Work Log for changes to the Delightful Nightly Builds framework while excluding individual dated builds.

title: Add linked idea briefs to the build-selection workflow
summary: Extended the idea backlog with linked durable briefs and required nightly agents to consult them before writing a selected build's PRD.

title: Restore dashboard support to the Work Log skill
summary: Restored a portable self-contained dashboard generator to the reconstructed Work Log skill and enabled automatic refresh after new entries.
